content.en:
Arrowmu Fortress, Mission Hall.

There are a lot of emperor levels here, but there are not many ancient demon levels.

Ye Tian didn't look at the other emperor-level either, he was quickly attracted by the tasks here.

Most of the tasks are to kill the emperor-level powerhouses of other main departments and the existence of ancient demons, as well as the task of killing the emperor's list.

Of course, it is not the emperor list powerhouse on the side of the main department of Aluo's mother, but the emperor list of other main departments.

Each main department has its own arrangement of emperor list powerhouses, and each emperor list is three hundred and sixty-five, a total of thirty-six main departments.

Therefore, there are more than 10,000 emperor-level powerhouses on the emperor list, but compared to the number of emperor-level powerhouses on the Huoxi space-time battlefield, there are too few powerhouses on the emperor list, and it is not easy to kill a powerhouse on the emperor list.

It is precisely because it is not easy that the task of killing the powerhouses of the Emperor List has extremely high rewards for combat performance.

In addition to these tasks, there are also tasks to find various treasure resources, after all, there are a lot of resources on the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and there are a lot of good things~.

Other than that.

On the battlefield of Huoxi time and space, there are enough rewards for killing the emperor level and the ancient demon level, and the emperor level and ancient demon level of each main department have a mark that belongs to the main department.

For example, Ye Tian, when he entered the A-Luo Mu Fortress, he was planted with the mark of the main department of A-Luo Mu.

On the battlefield, to distinguish between the enemy and the enemy, we rely on the mark of the main department.

"The task seems to be divided into a single task and a group task, and if the single task is completed, it is impossible to exempt the task requirements of the 1000 Ancient Demon Era of the warband, and the group task must be completed to achieve the task requirements of the 1000 Ancient Demon Era!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, if the individual strength is strong enough to take on a group task and can complete it alone, then it is okay.

However, Ye Tian was not interested in taking on any group tasks now, and his eyes were still staring at those individual tasks.

Soon, he took a fancy to a single mission.

[Enter the Flame Swamp, slay the Flame Spirit, and collect the Flame Orb. 】

This task is quite good, each Flame Demon Bead is worth 10 points, but the strength of the Flame Demon Spirit is very strong, and the average top emperor level is not an opponent at all.

Moreover, in this flame swamp, there is also that extremely terrifying flame demon.

In fact, there are other dangers in the Flame Swamp, such as the emperor level of the other main divisions.

The location of the Flame Swamp rests on the three main fortresses, in addition to the Aromu Fortress, there are also Dom Fortress and Saige Fortress.

Among them, Dom Fortress is a very powerful fortress, no less than Aromu Fortress, and Saige Fortress is much weaker.

This is all information that Ye Tian knows.

"Take this mission!"

Ye Tian immediately applied to receive this task, and only after receiving the task can he come back to submit the task and get the task reward.

After that, he applied for a map of the Huoxi Space-Time Battlefield, and prepared to leave the Aromu Fortress.

And before leaving, he needed to talk to the Dragon Warrior Ancient Demon, after all, the Dragon Warrior Ancient Demon was now the leader of the Dragon Apprentice Battle Group and the team leader.

"Lord Longshu Ancient Demon, I have taken a mission to leave the Aromu Fortress for a while. "

Ye Tian said.

"God, you've just come here, and you're going out?"

The Dragon Ancient Demon was surprised.

"Yes, I want to accumulate some more records!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, then be careful!"

Dragon Ancient Demon Path.

Ye Tian nodded, and then left.

Looking at the back of Ye Tian's departure, the Dragon Ancient Demon couldn't help but sigh at Ye Tian's efforts, he was not ready to go out to pick up the task in a short time, and Ye Tiancai was going to pick up the task when he came, this is the gap!

No wonder Ye Tian can be so powerful!

......

Leaving from the Arrow Mother Fortress, Ye Tian kept shuttling.

The suppression of heaven and earth here is very terrifying, and the suppression of ancient demon-level existences will be even greater.

It's just that the emperor-level can exert its own strength normally, and the strength of the ancient demon-level existence is equivalent to being sealed a lot.

For the emperor level, this is a good thing, otherwise the emperor level will not be able to withstand the aftermath of the battle of the ancient demon level, and a wisp of breath can suppress the average top emperor level.

Ye Tian came to the Flame Swamp.

The Flame Swamp is a black swamp, but above the swamp there are terrifying flames, and those flame demons are hidden in the flames of this flame swamp.

Ye Tian touched these flames and estimated their power.

"Ordinary emperor-level, when exposed to these flames, it is estimated that it will be difficult to resist for a long time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He escaped into the Flame Swamp and began to search for the Flame Spirit, and if he killed more Flame Spirit, he could get some rewards for his achievements.

Of course, if you encounter the emperor level of other main departments, you can also get a record after killing it.

And the emperor-level who can enter the flame swamp should not be weak.

"Found other emperors!"

Ye Tian shuttled over, but soon sensed the mark of the main department of the other party's mother, and couldn't help but be disappointed.

This is your own emperor's level, there is no benefit in killing it, and there will even be a punishment, deducting a large number of battle points.

And when that emperor-level saw Ye Tian, he was also slightly disappointed, obviously he also had the same idea, but when he saw that it was his own person, he naturally had no way to make a move.

Whew!!

The two separated and left in different directions.

After another while, Ye Tian discovered a flame demon spirit, and in an instant, this side of the void changed heaven and earth, turning into a flame space-time.

Rumble!!!!!

The size of the Flame Demon Spirit began to swell, and Ye Tian was like a speck of dust in his eyes.

I saw that the flame demon spirit slammed into a punch, and many space-time particles had to be shattered, and the power of this punch had already reached the standard of the top emperor level, and it was stronger than many top emperor levels.

"Die!"

Ye Tian cast the ultimate arcane technique of tearing the sky, and easily broke the opponent's fist and slashed the opponent's body.

Click!!!!

The other party's huge body began to crumble, and the illusioned flame space-time also collapsed.

I saw that the countless ultimate particles on the Flame Demon Spirit's body had shattered, and in the end, only one Flame Demon Bead was left.

"I didn't expect that I couldn't even carry an ordinary move!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He put away this Flame Demon Pillar, and the 10 battle points were in hand!

Immediately afterward, he searched for other flame spirits.

Soon after, he finally met the emperor level of another main department.

Ye Tian saw him, he also saw Ye Tian, and the two sides instantly burst out with a strong killing intent, both wanting to kill each other to gain a record.

In an instant, the two sides were fighting.

And with just one move, the opponent's body collapsed, and his eyes were full of disbelief.
